ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., π/4DQPSK, Sensitivity@0.01%BER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., signal quality, sensitivity, interference) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., dBm, dB) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the measurement was taken (e.g., None, -) */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition under which the measurement was taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., None, F=F0+1MHz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., frequency offset, temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., dBm, dB) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of system (e.g., cellular, satellite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_measurements" (
  "system_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system measurement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being measured */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the system measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_measurements_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_measurements_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
